purpose: Stylesheet for the IDE File Explorer panel and IDE Welcome screen. Defines .ide-explorer container (flex column), header with title + actions, file/folder rows with icons, hover/selected states, indentation for nested directories, plus the welcome screen styles shown when no workspace is open.
gotchas: .ide-explorer-* classes are scoped by prefix; .ide-explorer is the root anchor.
Loaded via main.jsx globally AND by FileExplorer.jsx + IDEWelcome.jsx — Vite dedupes but be aware.
patterns: Action buttons sized 22x22 (slightly smaller than nav buttons elsewhere — IDE compactness convention).
Uppercase letter-spaced 0.06em titles for section headers.
